summary: Tested PDF Credit/Debit Note generation feature. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend PDF download button works correctly - successfully downloaded CN-2026-0002.pdf (4378 bytes, valid %PDF-1.4 header). PDF generation uses Emergent's object storage API for upload/download. On-demand PDF generation works when pdf_path is not stored.
seed_data_creation: Used existing notes CN-2026-0001 and CN-2026-0002 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation feature is fully working. Key points: 1) generate-monthly-note endpoint creates PDF and uploads to object storage, 2) download endpoint at /api/distributors/{id}/notes/{note_id}/download returns PDF, 3) If pdf_path is not stored, PDF is generated on-demand, 4) Frontend BillingTab.jsx has download button with FileDown icon, 5) PDF starts with %PDF-1.4 header (valid), 6) Object storage path format: nyla-crm/debit-credit-notes/{distributor_id}/{note_number}.pdf

on_demand_pdf_generation.description: If pdf_path not stored, generates PDF on download request

pdf_content_includes: Distributor details (name, code, gstin, pan, address)
Signature blocks (Prepared By, Authorized Signatory, Distributor Acknowledgment)
